projects.name: DSX V2
projects.desc: Mechanical reference design to support AI Factories.

projects.name: Project Athena (SJC-19)
projects.desc: 303K SqFt Bay Area research & innovation facility — Super Lab + Pre-cluster (Logos). Phase 1: 37 MW / 49 MW grid, RFS Feb 2027.

projects.name: Design & Permits
projects.desc: Facility design, OPR, CPP, lease, and all City of San Jose construction permits.

projects.name: Construction & OFCI Procurement
projects.desc: MEP install, structural steel, HVAC/electrical equipment. 360+ workers on site. OFCI: CDUs, HACs, chillers, MSBs, MTSs, PTXs, CRACs, substation.

projects.name: Mechanical Equipment Delivery (OFCI)
projects.desc: All Owner-Furnished Contractor-Installed thermal/mechanical equipment. CDUs, SmartRun HACs, Chillers, Fluid Coolers, HX, CRACs.

projects.name: Factory Witness Testing (FWT)
projects.desc: FWT program for all major OFCI equipment before shipment. MSB/PDU complete; SmartRun HAC upcoming.

projects.name: Power & Networking Infrastructure
projects.desc: OSP Fiber, CorpNet/FacNet, Permanent Power Energization (Substation). On track — 0 days delta on all three milestones.

projects.name: Commissioning & Functional Performance Testing
projects.desc: Level 4 Commissioning. Start date tied to MCP availability. Cx Workshop: Jun 23-24. Possible use of rental chiller to accelerate.

projects.name: Logos Zone 1 — RFS & Rack Ready
projects.desc: Handover to ASE. Slab demolition + 2.5-story steel structure. HITT construction starts late Jun/early Jul 2026. Latest estimate: Feb 16, 2027 (+28 days vs business required).

projects.name: Super Lab 1 & 2 — RFS & Rack Ready
projects.desc: Handover to DCOps + RESS. GC: DPR. Latest estimate: Feb 16, 2027 (+17 days vs business required). Bring up & validation target: Apr 15, 2027.

projects.name: Athena Digital Twin
projects.desc: Power load balancing and leak detection capability. Available as part of building turnover. Partner: Jacobs. Expected complete early Q4 2026.
